title: Orange Netherite
body:
Retextures Netherite to be orange.

# Retextured items list
- Netherite Helmet
- Netherite Chestplate
- Netherite Leggings
- Netherite Boots
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Pickaxe
- Netherite Axe
- Netherite Shovel
- Netherite Hoe
- Netherite Spear
- Netherite Nautilus Armor
- Netherite Horse Armor
- Netherite Scrap
- Netherite Ingot
- Netherite Upgrade Template
- Netherite Block
